notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Connor Joe advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Leody Taveras. Connor Joe out at 3rd on the throw, center fielder Leody Taveras to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to third baseman Blaze Alexander.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, third baseman J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Miles Mastrobuoni. Jackson Holliday scores. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Adley Rutschman on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
